title: Starter Kit – AMD Kria KV260 - Release Notes
summary: v1.1.1 - Change logs (03/10/2025) V4L2 sensor drivers update GenX320 sensor Updated default bias values to align with the latest MP specification Extended several biases ranges to improve flexibility bias_diff_on: [24; 78] bias_diff_off: [19; 127] ...
answer:
v1.1.1 - Change logs (03/10/2025)

  1. V4L2 sensor drivers update
    1. GenX320 sensor
      1. Updated default bias values to align with the latest MP specification
      2. Extended several biases ranges to improve flexibility
        1. bias_diff_on: [24; 78]
        2. bias_diff_off: [19; 127]
        3. bias_fo: [19; 50]
      3. Added synchronization IO control
      4. Added camera control interface debug trace
    2. IMX636 sensor
      1. Fixed bias_refr initialization sequence
      2. Updated the default value for bias_diff to 0x4d
      3. Extended bias_fo range to improve flexibility
        1. bias fo: [45; 140]
      4. Added synchronization IO control
    3. OpenEB SDK minor update
      1. Fixed the relative range control in IMX636 bias facility
    4. Active Marker application:
      1. Updated GenX320 bias_fo value in camera config file
